desc: Private 4-bedroom Colonial at end of a quiet street. Fireplace and cathedral ceiling in family room. Updated kitchen with granite countertops and ceramic tiles. Central A/C, updated master bath, aluminum fence. Close to shopping.
description:
Private 4-bedroom Colonial situated at the end of a quiet street, offering a peaceful retreat with excellent privacy. The family room features a wood-burning fireplace and soaring cathedral ceilings, creating a warm and welcoming gathering space.

The updated kitchen boasts granite countertops and ceramic tile floors. The master bath has been recently updated. Outside, an aluminum fence encloses the yard. Conveniently located close to shopping and major commuter routes.
